title: DAIMORYX

title: ELYDJIN

title: PURRCHILI
desc: Helga named her cat|after her favorite|spicy chili pepper.

title: PURRSHOCKA
desc: Helga named her cat |after 1 electric shock made|her knit faster than light.

desc: Helga named her cat|after it sang to the moon|like a tiny opera star.

title: PURRSNUBBLE

desc: Helga named her cat|after its silly obsession|with anything gold that blings.

title: PURRBUFF
desc: He got obsessed with making|protein shakes from milk|and level up snacks.

desc: Careful! A single touch|of its green slime is|fatal to any human.

desc: The legendary golden | dragon egg has hatched.

desc: Goldaby the first legendary | gold dragon.

title: GOXABYX

desc: Goxydys is the |evolution of Goxabyx

title: GOLDONYX
desc: His fearsome look strikes|fear into all who|oppose him.

skin.title: SKULLDONYX
skin.desc: The primal skin from | the ancient dragon

skin.desc: Every Dynamon fears|to get eaten|by Snowdonyx!

desc: He obtained new life by | rising from the gold | ashes of the phoenix

skin.title: FENIXARO CHRISTMAS
skin.desc: He will celebrate his | winnings in Christmas style!

skin.title: FENIXARO REBORN
skin.desc: From ashes of death he|was reborn, wielding the|darkness that destroyed him

title: TYCERATOX

desc: He soared in the|sky before dinosaur|extinction.

skin.desc: He only removes|his helmet when|he gets angry.

title: COBRAGORA
